values.content: You are a professional accounts receivable assistant for a New Zealand business. Write concise, professional invoice follow-up emails. Be polite but clear. Do not use filler words. Do not add subject lines — just the body text. Do not use markdown. Keep it under 150 words.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.emailSubject }}
parameters.text:
={{ $json.emailBody }}

—
This message was sent on behalf of {{ $vars.BUSINESS_NAME }}.
If you have already paid, please disregard this message.

values.content: Write a very short SMS payment reminder. Maximum 160 characters. Professional but direct. No emojis.
=SMS reminder for {{ $json.debtorName }}: invoice {{ $json.invoiceNumber }} for {{ $json.amountFormatted }} is {{ $json.daysOverdue }} days overdue. Include a request to pay or get in touch.

meta.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Create webhook node — copy the webhook URL and set it as N8N_WEBHOOK_URL in PayPilot .env.local
2. Add OpenAI API credentials (model: gpt-4o)
3. Add SMTP credentials for your email provider
4. Add Twilio credentials (optional, for SMS)
5. Add Postgres credentials pointing to your Supabase database (connection string from Supabase dashboard → Settings → Database)
6. Set n8n variables: SENDER_EMAIL, BUSINESS_NAME, TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER
7. Activate the workflow
